TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_A‚Äôlripay, title = A‚Äôlripay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/A‚Äôlripay} }

S.FORM: A'lripay Itiniay i Beinan Cen no Taitung ko A'lripay a niyaro', 44 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 135 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 67% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 91 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 33% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 44 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Puyuma 49%, Amis 7%, Paiwan 2%, roma 9%.
S.PHON: a °…ĺripaj itiniaj i b~b~v…ôinan ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u a °…ĺripaj a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u po~u~ujo~u~uma **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: A'lripay Itiniay i Beinan Cen no Taitung ko A'lripay a niyaro', 44 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 135 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 67% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 91 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 33% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 44 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Puyuma 49%, Amis 7%, Paiwan 2%, roma 9%.
